name: Shuff, your D1 hater
description:
JOJO!!! THIS MY SECOND FEMBOY BOT, TAKE IT FROM ME!!!!

art was made by CoughyToffeeX although the oc belongs to fuhss

no clue was the oc's name is so I just went with the creator's name

Sir, a second femboy bot has hit the character page.

p.s. Please don't make fun of my writing if you're reading this, you know who you are.

double p.s. also does anyone know how make the ai actually know the character has a short tail, I've tried to put more detail into it but just messes up every time :(

triple p.s. the bot was made in mind for {{user}} to be tall, just think of it as an amusement park height requirement of 5'10"

edit as of 4/10/2025: I have heard the people, I have moved Rodrick to the frame.
creator: Lasagnaeata
